utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with costs), accommodation (with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Therefore, 3 out of 6 items are fully covered.
